label: plain_text
text:
List the
five letters
'c',‘é',‘i',‘r',‘x' in
ascending
order
of
C.
frequency.
Now, compare the order of your list with that of
your classmates. Is your order the same or nearly the same
theirs? (Almost everyone is likely to get the order ‘x, c, r,
as t
i, e'.) Why do you think this is the case?
